itinerary.title: Premium Mizoram Adventure Explorer
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl • Reiek Trekking • Dampa Tiger Reserve • Palak Lake • Adventure Immersion
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM MIZORAM ADVENTURE EXPLORER — Aizawl • Reiek Trekking • Dampa Tiger Reserve • Palak Lake • Adventure Immersion. 06 Nights / 07 Days High-Energy Mizoram Adventure Expedition.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Unleash your spirit of adventure with this high-energy TRAGUIN curated expedition. Designed for thrill-seekers, this Mizoram Adventure Explorer package blends rugged mountain trekking, wildlife exploration in tiger reserves, and immersive wild-lake camping. Experience exclusive experiences, enjoy nature-centric stays, and walk away with absolute unforgettable memories in the unspoiled wilderness of Mizoram.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-002 | Premium Mizoram Adventure Explorer | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Mizoram package (MZ-002 / TRG-MIZ-ADV-2026): Aizawl • Reiek Trekking • Dampa Tiger Reserve • Palak Lake • Adventure Immersion with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & BASECAMP SETUP
Day 03: DAMPA TIGER RESERVE WILDLIFE SAFARI
TRAGUIN curated Premium Mizoram Adventure Explorer with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & BASECAMP SETUP
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl, the capital of Mizoram. Private transfer to your basecamp hotel. Gear up for the adventure ahead with a briefing session.

days.title: REIEK MOUNTAIN TREKKING
days.description: Embark on an exhilarating trek to the summit of Reiek Mountain. Witness stunning panoramic views of the Mizoram hills and untouched forest canopy.
activities: Panoramic views of Mizoram hills and forest canopy.

days.title: DAMPA TIGER RESERVE WILDLIFE SAFARI
days.description: Venture into the Dampa Tiger Reserve. Explore one of India's most remote wildlife sanctuaries, spotting diverse flora and rare wildlife in their natural habitat.
activities: Wildlife safari in Dampa Tiger Reserve.
Flora and fauna exploration in remote sanctuary.

days.title: PALAK LAKE ADVENTURE
days.description: Travel to Palak Lake, the largest lake in Mizoram. Enjoy boating and camping under the stars in the peaceful, wild landscape.
activities: Boating at Palak Lake — largest lake in Mizoram.
Camping under the stars in wild landscape.

days.title: CAVING & WILDERNESS TRAIL
days.description: Explore hidden cave networks in the remote hills of Mizoram, experiencing an off-the-grid wilderness trek.
activities: Cave exploration in remote Mizoram hills.

days.title: CULTURAL IMMERSION & RELAXATION
days.description: Visit traditional Mizo villages, interacting with local communities and learning indigenous mountain survival and craft techniques.
activities: Indigenous craft and mountain survival techniques.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your premium Mizoram adventure.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 6 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Adventure activities including trekking, wildlife safari, boating, and caving as per itinerary.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
